response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates strong full-stack and distributed systems expertise with exposure to AI-agent infrastructure, but lacks explicit executive leadership experience in fintech or regulated environments. His background in agentic workflows and event-driven systems is relevant, though not at the scale or seniority required for this CTO role.
strengths: Hands-on experience with AI-agent infrastructure (e.g., MCP code generators, agentic workflows at re:cinq).
Proven track record in building and scaling distributed systems (e.g., microservices at Sociomantic, event-driven platforms at GISCollective).
Diverse technical expertise across languages (TypeScript, DLang, Node.js) and domains (fintech, GIS, real-time systems).
concerns: No explicit executive leadership experience (e.g., scaling teams from 10 to 30+ or owning CTO-level responsibilities).
Limited fintech-specific experience (e.g., credit systems, regulatory compliance, or real-time risk modeling).
Agentic AI work appears more experimental than production-grade (e.g., no mention of high-stakes or regulated deployments).
